name: Accounting Full Implementation
description: Complete Accounting implementation workflow: analyze requirements, configure chart of accounts and journals, set up taxes and fiscal positions, validate reconciliation, and deliver reports.

steps.name: Analyze Requirements
steps.description: Analyze accounting requirements: localization, multi-company, multi-currency, reporting needs

steps.name: Configure Chart of Accounts
steps.description: Install localization, create accounts and account groups

steps.name: Setup Journals
steps.description: Create sales, purchase, cash, and bank journals with sequences and default accounts

steps.name: Configure Taxes & Fiscal Positions
steps.description: Set up taxes, repartition lines, tax grids, and fiscal position mappings

steps.name: Validate Bank Reconciliation
steps.description: Configure bank journals, reconciliation models, and validate statement processing

steps.name: Configure Financial Reports
steps.description: Set up P&L, balance sheet, and tax reports; verify report hierarchies

steps.name: Final Validation
steps.description: Post sample invoices and payments; reconcile a test statement; review reports
